technique_summary: Instructional video demonstrating FLS pattern cutting setup and technique principles

demonstrated_techniques: proper equipment setup and fixation clamp positioning
bimanual instrument coordination for traction and countertraction
laparoscopic camera positioning for optimal visualization
verbal_cues: repeat the exercise taking the time each time
common_errors_addressed: inadequate traction leading to poor cutting control
single-handed technique instead of bimanual coordination
